name: MasterKodi AI Subs
changelog: ARVIO-inspired: (1) Groq Llama-3.3-70B as an optional very-fast model (set a free Groq key); (2) JSON-mode RESCUE when SRT parse fails (rescue-only, normal path unchanged); (3) Progressive subtitles — Hebrew appears within seconds and fills in as it translates (default on, identical final text). Quality of the default path unchanged.
